Our Partners

We work alongside trusted organisations that share our commitment to excellence.

Strategic Partnerships

Our partnerships extend our capability and reach, enabling us to deliver comprehensive solutions across geographies and disciplines.

Defence and Government

Collaboration with defence organisations and government agencies to deliver security solutions at the highest classification levels.

Intelligence and Investigations

Trusted relationships with specialist intelligence providers and investigative consultancies across multiple jurisdictions.

Close Protection Networks

Vetted networks of close protection operatives and security professionals, enabling rapid deployment across the globe.

Our partner network is built on discretion, trust, and shared operational standards. If your organisation operates in defence, security, or risk management and you are interested in a collaborative relationship, we welcome your enquiry.

Enquire About Partnership

Work With Us

We are always open to collaborating with organisations that uphold our standards of excellence.

Get in Touch
Sangnoir

International risk management consultancy and security services provider. Safeguarding all that matters to you since 2011.
